name: Tinkoff Invest
description: Native OpenClaw tools for Tinkoff Invest API: accounts, instruments, market data, portfolio, operations, and optional trading actions.

token.description: Tinkoff Invest API token. Leave empty until you fill it in the UI.

baseUrl.description: REST base URL. Use the sandbox REST endpoint if you want sandbox mode.

allowTrading.description: Enable mutating tools like post/cancel order. Keep false for readonly mode.

appName.description: Custom User-Agent / client app name sent to the upstream API.
